query: Pathway cross-talk: How do MAPK and PI3K/AKT pathways interact in colon cancer progression?
Frequent mutations: Which gene mutations are most frequently reported in lung cancer?
Targeted therapies: What targeted drugs are investigated for thyroid cancer and how do they work mechanistically?
Drug resistance: How do BRAF or KRAS mutations contribute to therapy resistance in colon cancer?
Trial phases: What phases of clinical trials (I/II/III) are represented in lung cancer studies?
In vivo models: What animal models are commonly used in lung cancer research?
Cell lines: Which in vitro cell lines are used to study colon cancer?
Genomic heterogeneity: How do genomic profiles vary among tumor samples within lung cancer?
Prognostic signatures: Are there gene-expression or multi-gene signatures proposed to predict prognosis in colon cancer?
Multi-omics integration: Does any paper integrate genomic, transcriptomic or proteomic data for thyroid cancer, and what are the key findings?
Combination therapy: What combination treatments (e.g., chemotherapy + immunotherapy) are tested for lung cancer and how effective are they?
Immune checkpoints: Which immune checkpoints (e.g., PD-1, CTLA-4) are targeted in thyroid cancer therapies?
Mechanisms of resistance: What molecular mechanisms of drug resistance are described in colon cancer?
Pharmacokinetics: Are there pharmacokinetic or pharmacodynamic studies of targeted therapy in colon cancer?
Cost analysis: What cost-effectiveness studies exist for therapies in thyroid cancer?
Real-world evidence: Are there observational or real-world studies reported for lung cancer?
Surgical outcomes: What surgical interventions are reported for thyroid cancer and what are their outcomes?
Resistance reversal: What strategies are explored to overcome resistance to targeted therapies in thyroid cancer?
Molecular pathways: What signalling pathways are implicated in colon cancer progression?
Tumor microenvironment: How does the tumor microenvironment influence lung cancer progression?
Survival outcomes: What overall or disease-free survival rates are reported for colon cancer patients?
Diagnostic biomarkers: Which biomarkers are proposed for the diagnosis of colon cancer?
Diagnostic methods: What techniques are used for early detection of thyroid cancer?
Adverse effects: What adverse events are associated with immunotherapy or targeted therapy in colon cancer?
Microbiome influences: Do any papers mention the role of the microbiome in colon cancer progression or therapy response?
